job_description: We are looking for a Senior Frontend Developer skilled in React, Redux, and modern CSS to build scalable web applications. Experience with Next.js is a plus.
Join our backend team to build APIs using Python, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL. Knowledge of Docker and CI/CD pipelines is heavily preferred.
Looking for an expert AI engineer to build multi-agent systems using LangGraph and LangChain. Proficiency in working with LLMs (Gemini/OpenAI) is required.
Seeking a Full Stack Developer with experience in React for the frontend and Python/Node.js for the backend. Must be able to manage database schemas and deploy on AWS.
We need a Data Scientist to analyze massive user datasets and build predictive models. Strong Python, pandas, and scikit-learn skills are necessary.
